primary_proxy.name: consensus_outcome_rank_v1
primary_proxy.description: Weighted consensus score across core benchmark-success planners using success, collisions, near-misses, and normalized time-to-goal.

verified_simple_assessment.recommendation: The current camera-ready campaign does not include the verified-simple candidate scenarios. Keep the subset as a debugging or promotion gate for now and run one bounded pilot before treating it as a calibration set.
